item.title: A message from the main office:
item.description: A reminder to students in grades 9 to 12 , if you want to dress down during exams you can donate at least 2 uniform items. The donated uniforms must be dropped off at the main office, with the student name recorded, before is June 12th.

item.title: A message from Ms. Brennan.
item.description: Garden Club will be meeting after school today out front to continue our spring cleanup. New members are always welcome!

item.title: A message from Prom Committee:
item.description: Prom meeting is finally here, today at lunch in Room 202!

item.title: A message from 7/8 Track & Field-
item.description: The group had a wonderful day at RHS on Tuesday. Here are some mentions: Eudora 1st in 400m, 2nd in 800m, Jazmine - 2nd in 400m and Triple Jump, 4th in 200m and Vertical Jump, Ayla 1st in 800m and 1500m, Eli 1st in Javelin, Colton 2nd in 1500m and 3rd in 800m, Sylus 2nd in 200m, Sam 1st in Vertical Jump, Kaiden 3rd in Vertical Jump and Norah 4th in Vertical Jump, Kyden 5th in 80m and Evelyn 4th in 200m. Nice job everyone!

item.title: A message from Mr. Curtis:
item.description: Congratulations to the Yardbirds and STA Senior Band on an outstanding performance last night. From 'Chameleon' to 'Crazy Train', you performed with energetic, musical and powerful sound, and you should all be proud of your efforts. Bravo!
